report: Crawled - Currently Not Indexed — 5 URL Audit
note: 1 URL is favicon.ico (Google artifact, ignore). 3 are noindexed scenario pages. 1 is a guide page at quality risk.

diagnosis.rationale: Page is indexable (index,follow), in sitemap, 7,590 words — but Google crawled and rejected. Quality/content gap. Guide needs: better short answer, real examples, FAQ section, calculator CTA, schema markup.
diagnosis.impressions_clicks: Unknown (no GSC performance data for this URL separately)
diagnosis.internal_links: Linked from /guides listing page, has CalculatorGuideLinks component
recommended_improvements: Add concise 'Key Takeaway' summary at top (50-80 words) — Google's short-answer extraction
Add real-world example: 'Meet Sarah, age 62, earning $85K...' with specific numbers
Add FAQ section with schema markup (FAQPage structured data)
Add calculator CTA: 'Try our Retirement & Social Security Calculator →'
Add 2-3 related internal links to calculators (retirement-planning, 401k-calculator, tax-calculator)
Improve readability: shorter paragraphs, bullet points, key terms bolded
Add author/expertise signals (author bio, last reviewed date)
Add table/chart: 'Social Security Benefits by Age (62 vs 67 vs 70)'

diagnosis.rationale: Already noindexed. Google crawled it, saw noindex tag, and correctly didn't index. Listed under 'crawled not indexed' because Google crawled before/after noindex was deployed. Page is 7,486 words of auto-generated scenario content — low unique value. Should be removed from sitemap to stop Google from discovering/crawling it.
Same as above — auto-generated scenario, noindexed, should be removed from sitemap.
Same as above — auto-generated scenario, noindexed, should be removed from sitemap.
favicon.ico is a browser asset, not a page. Google shouldn't be trying to index it. Artifact of Google's crawler being overly thorough. No action needed — Google will naturally drop it.
diagnosis.recommended_action: Ignore. If persistent, add X-Robots-Tag: noindex to favicon.ico responses.

why_validation_failed: Google's validation 'Failed' for crawled-not-indexed because: (a) 3 scenario pages are still noindexed but in sitemap — Google crawled, saw noindex, didn't index — correct; (b) 1 guide page was crawled but Google's quality assessment rejected it; (c) 1 is favicon.ico artifact.
decision: HOLD — DO NOT VALIDATE until improvements deployed
decision_rationale: 3/5 are already noindexed — validating would be pointless (google already confirmed noindex)
1/5 is guide page needing quality improvements — validate ONLY after improvements deployed + 7 days
Remove 3 scenario pages from sitemap to stop Google from discovering them
Improve Social Security guide content before considering validation

fix_priority.action: Remove 3 noindexed scenario pages from sitemap.xml
Improve Social Security guide content quality
improvements: Add real-world example with specific numbers
